================================================================================
Improved approach: LightGBM suite + OOF Target Encoding + Quantile/Risk heads + VAL affine calibration
 - Stronger user-level temporal features (aggregate + compact day-wise subset)
 - AWMSE custom objective for asymmetric cost
 - Quantile (τ=0.20) conservative bound
 - Negative-probability classifier used for risk adjustment
 - Post-hoc affine calibration on VAL to drastically improve budget/error_rate without hurting rank metrics
